bounded_scope: Extend the protected-record access audit matrix from the teacher review queue to /api/reviews/:submissionId/history and /api/reviews/:submissionId/decision without direct Figma work.
changes: /api/reviews/:submissionId/history now audits missing-session, scope-denied, and successful review-history reads as review_history_unauthorized, review_history_denied, and review_history_viewed.
Review-history audit metadata now includes redacted actor role scopes for authenticated users plus review/status/version/comment result counts for successful reads.
/api/reviews/:submissionId/decision now audits missing-session reviewer attempts as review_decision_unauthorized.
Review-decision denied and successful action audit metadata now includes redacted actor role scopes.
tests/review-loop.integration.test.mjs now covers history unauthorized/denied/viewed access and decision unauthorized/denied access alongside the existing review loop and queue scope tests.
tests/production-workflow-source.test.mjs now locks the new review access audit markers.

validation.result: passed; 6/6 review-loop, queue, history, and decision access tests
passed; 175 passing tests and 4 expected opt-in skips
passed; cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated output, site options, static/live Cloudflare verification, and 175 passing tests / 4 expected opt-in skips
